researchQuestion: What is the biggest risk hiding in this warehouse right now?

lines: [Verse 1] Scanning ecommerce warehouse, checking every row
Six tables in the catalog, ready for the show
Alex sees the brightness, lineage flowing clear
But Morgan's in the shadows, waiting for the fear
Data health is falling down, listen to our song
Eight tests are passing, three are left in doubt
DataBard is here to tell you what it's all about
[Verse 2] Morgan spots the trouble, cracks within the wall
Flagging orders table for stale pipeline data
Flagging customers table for PII governance gaps
Trace the lineage backward, watch the metrics fall
But knowledge is the power, to fix what we have found
[Outro] Fix the pipelines, close the governance gap
Document the schemas, DataBard has the map
DataBard will be back, same data blues tune
